title: Update testimonial dates to January 2026 and add service photos to Services section

requirements.text: Update all testimonial dates in frontend/src/components/Testimonials.tsx so that the most recent reviews are dated up to January 2026. Distribute dates realistically across 2025 and early 2026, keeping all other review content (names, locations, ratings, service types, review text) unchanged.

quotes: ajoute des avis jusqu'à la date janvier 2026

acceptanceCriteria: At least one testimonial is dated January 2026
Dates span across 2025 and early 2026 (no dates earlier than 2024)
All other review fields (name, location, rating, text, service type) remain intact
Date formatting remains consistent with the existing style

requirements.text: Replace the icon/square placeholder in each service card within frontend/src/components/Services.tsx with a relevant illustrative photo. Each of the six service cards (e.g., réfection de toiture, pose de tuiles, réparation, isolation, zinguerie, nettoyage/traitement) must display a dedicated photo image instead of the current icon square. Images must be rendered from frontend/public/assets/generated, fit the card layout, and include a descriptive alt attribute in French.

quotes: ajoute des photo a chaque spécificités par exemple la ou il y a marqué réparation le petit carré essaye de mettre de photo a la place

acceptanceCriteria: Each service card displays a photo image instead of the icon/square
Six distinct photos are used, one per service type
Each image has a descriptive French alt attribute matching the service type
Card layout remains visually consistent and responsive across desktop and mobile
Images are properly sized and cropped to fit the card (e.g., object-cover)

constraints: Do not modify any files under frontend/src/hooks/ or frontend/src/components/ui
Do not alter any existing contact information, company name, addresses, or phone numbers
All user-facing text must remain in French
nonGoals: Adding new service types or changing service descriptions
Changing navigation, hero, about, contact, or footer sections
Adding a contact form or new page sections

required: Aerial view of workers performing a full roof replacement on a French residential house with terracotta tiles (service-refection-toiture.dim_800x500.png)
Close-up of a roofer carefully laying traditional clay roofing tiles on a sloped roof (service-pose-tuiles.dim_800x500.png)
Roofer repairing a cracked or damaged section of a slate roof with tools visible (service-reparation.dim_800x500.png)
Cross-section view of roof insulation being installed between wooden rafters in a French attic (service-isolation.dim_800x500.png)
Close-up of shiny zinc gutters and flashing being fitted around a roof edge and chimney (service-zinguerie.dim_800x500.png)
Pressure washing or moss treatment being applied to a tiled roof surface, showing before/after contrast (service-nettoyage.dim_800x500.png)
